chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-562 / 2026 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE 1) For orders on Misc. No. 2579/2026. 2) For orders on office objection No. 1, 3, 5, 8 &9. 3) For orders on Misc. No. 2580/2026. 4) For hearing of main case. 12.02.2026. Mr. Ahmed Ali, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG. M/s. Ghulam Akbar Lashari & Gul Afshan, Advocates for Respondent (SBCA). ___________________ 1) Granted. 2 to 4) At the very outset, learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied and will not press instant Petition if the direction are given to the Grievance Redressal Committee to decide the application of the Petitioner. Learned AAG present in Court in some other matter waives notice of this Petition. Accordingly, the Grievance Redressal Committee is directed to decide the application of the Petitioner available at Page 95 within four weeks and pass an speaking order after issuance notice to the parties. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
